case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. JUAN J FUENTES

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF COUNSEL RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST, WAIVER OF COSTS, WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 210075933) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.
